requirement_topic.en: EMC, Radio/Wireless Approval and Conformity Marking for Power Banks with Integrated Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 集成电子元件移动电源的EMC、无线核准与合格标志
requirement_topic.zht: 整合電子元件行動電源的EMC、無線核准與合格標誌

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) are electronic apparatus subject to electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) and product-conformity obligations administered through the Public Authority for Industry (PAI) under KUCAS, using adopted GSO standards (which mirror IEC/CISPR EMC standards). If the power bank incorporates any wireless functionality — Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, or NFC — it additionally requires type approval from CITRA (Communication and Information Technology Regulatory Authority), the Kuwaiti radio/telecom regulator, before import and sale. CITRA approval governs use of radio spectrum in Kuwait and is distinct from the PAI/KUCAS product-safety and EMC conformity. The conformity documentation (Technical Evaluation Report under KUCAS) must reflect the EMC test evidence; wireless models must also carry CITRA approval.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）作为电子装置，须满足通过公共工业管理局（PAI）在KUCAS下管理的电磁兼容（EMC）及产品合格义务，依据采纳的GSO标准（与IEC/CISPR的EMC标准一致）。若移动电源包含任何无线功能——Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示或NFC——则在进口和销售前还须取得科威特无线电/电信监管机构CITRA（通信和信息技术监管局）的型号核准。CITRA核准管理科威特境内无线电频谱使用，与PAI/KUCAS的产品安全和EMC合格评定相区分。合格评定文件（KUCAS下的技术评估报告）须反映EMC测试证据；无线型号还须持有CITRA核准。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）作為電子裝置，須滿足透過公共工業管理局（PAI）在KUCAS下管理的電磁相容（EMC）及產品合格義務，依據採納的GSO標準（與IEC/CISPR的EMC標準一致）。若行動電源包含任何無線功能——Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示或NFC——則在進口和銷售前還須取得科威特無線電/電信監管機構CITRA（通信和信息技術監管局）的型號核准。CITRA核准管理科威特境內無線電頻譜使用，與PAI/KUCAS的產品安全和EMC合格評定相區分。合格評定文件（KUCAS下的技術評估報告）須反映EMC測試證據；無線型號還須持有CITRA核准。

standards_or_laws: Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme (KUCAS) — Public Authority for Industry (PAI), EMC/product conformity using adopted GSO standards
GSO-adopted CISPR/IEC EMC standards (e.g., CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 equivalents) for emissions and immunity
CITRA type approval — Communication and Information Technology Regulatory Authority, Kuwait — required for products with wireless/radio functions

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (radio disturbance, Class B) for emissions and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity) for information technology equipment. Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT administration, specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and SRRC approval are NOT recognised by PAI/KUCAS or by CITRA; both EMC conformity and any radio approval must be re-established for Kuwait. Because Kuwait's GSO EMC standards adopt the same CISPR/IEC base as international practice, an existing CISPR-based EMC report is often more directly usable for KUCAS than a GB/T report.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求：辐射方面适用GB/T 9254.1-2021（无线电骚扰，B类），抗扰度方面适用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技术设备）。含无线功能的产品须依据工业和信息化部的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告及SRRC核准不被PAI/KUCAS或CITRA认可；EMC合格评定及任何无线电核准均须为科威特重新建立。由于科威特GSO的EMC标准采纳与国际惯例相同的CISPR/IEC基础，既有的基于CISPR的EMC报告往往比GB/T报告更可直接用于KUCAS。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求：輻射方面適用GB/T 9254.1-2021（無線電騷擾，B類），抗擾度方面適用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技術設備）。含無線功能的產品須依據工業和信息化部的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告及SRRC核准不被PAI/KUCAS或CITRA認可；EMC合格評定及任何無線電核准均須為科威特重新建立。由於科威特GSO的EMC標準採納與國際慣例相同的CISPR/IEC基礎，既有的基於CISPR的EMC報告往往比GB/T報告更可直接用於KUCAS。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: Power banks with integrated electronics must demonstrate EMC conformity under KUCAS (PAI) using adopted GSO/CISPR standards; Chinese GB/T 9254 reports are not standalone evidence for KUCAS. The larger gap is wireless: any Qi, Bluetooth, or NFC function triggers a separate CITRA type approval that is wholly distinct from China's SRRC approval and from the PAI product file. Practical steps for a Chinese exporter: (1) obtain a CISPR-based EMC test report acceptable under GSO for the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report; (2) for wireless models, obtain CITRA type approval confirming the device operates only in Kuwait-permitted frequency bands and power levels; (3) ensure the conformity documentation lists both the safety (GSO/IEC 62133) and EMC evidence; (4) account for the 240 V / 50 Hz supply for any mains charger shipped with the unit. SRRC approval does not transfer to CITRA.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件的移动电源须在KUCAS（PAI）下依据采纳的GSO/CISPR标准证明EMC合格；中国GB/T 9254报告不能作为KUCAS的独立证据。更大的差距在于无线：任何Qi、蓝牙或NFC功能都触发单独的CITRA型号核准，与中国SRRC核准及PAI产品文件完全不同。中国出口商的实务步骤：（1）取得GSO下可接受的基于CISPR的EMC检测报告，用于KUCAS技术评估报告；（2）无线型号须取得CITRA型号核准，确认设备仅在科威特许可的频段和功率下工作；（3）确保合格评定文件同时列出安全（GSO/IEC 62133）及EMC证据；（4）为随附市电充电器考虑240 V / 50 Hz供电。SRRC核准不可转移至CITRA。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件的行動電源須在KUCAS（PAI）下依據採納的GSO/CISPR標準證明EMC合格；中國GB/T 9254報告不能作為KUCAS的獨立證據。更大的差距在於無線：任何Qi、藍牙或NFC功能都觸發單獨的CITRA型號核准，與中國SRRC核准及PAI產品文件完全不同。中國出口商的實務步驟：（1）取得GSO下可接受的基於CISPR的EMC檢測報告，用於KUCAS技術評估報告；（2）無線型號須取得CITRA型號核准，確認設備僅在科威特許可的頻段和功率下工作；（3）確保合格評定文件同時列出安全（GSO/IEC 62133）及EMC證據；（4）為隨附市電充電器考慮240 V / 50 Hz供電。SRRC核准不可轉移至CITRA。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformity under KUCAS (PAI) using adopted GSO/CISPR standards applies to power banks with integrated electronics; CITRA type approval is mandatory before import/sale for any model with wireless/radio functions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks are electronic apparatus subject to EMC conformity under the PAI-administered KUCAS scheme using adopted GSO/CISPR standards, and any wireless variant additionally requires CITRA type approval before import and sale in Kuwait. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports and SRRC approval are not recognised in Kuwait. A CISPR-based EMC report is more directly usable for KUCAS than a GB/T report, but wireless models must separately clear CITRA. The conformity documentation must cover safety, EMC, and radio evidence together.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源属于电子装置，须在PAI实施的KUCAS计划下依据采纳的GSO/CISPR标准进行EMC合格评定；任何无线型号在科威特进口和销售前还须取得CITRA型号核准。中国GB/T 9254报告及SRRC核准在科威特不被认可。基于CISPR的EMC报告比GB/T报告更可直接用于KUCAS，但无线型号须单独通过CITRA。合格评定文件须同时涵盖安全、EMC及无线电证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源屬於電子裝置，須在PAI實施的KUCAS計劃下依據採納的GSO/CISPR標準進行EMC合格評定；任何無線型號在科威特進口和銷售前還須取得CITRA型號核准。中國GB/T 9254報告及SRRC核准在科威特不被認可。基於CISPR的EMC報告比GB/T報告更可直接用於KUCAS，但無線型號須單獨通過CITRA。合格評定文件須同時涵蓋安全、EMC及無線電證據。

source.publisher: Communication and Information Technology Regulatory Authority (CITRA), State of Kuwait — type approval
